PLSC789 Advances in Research (1 Credit)

Discussion of advances in plant science research based on classic and current scientific literature.

Repeatable to: 7 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. AGRO789, NRSC789, or PLSC789.

Formerly: NRSC789.

PLSC798 Graduate Seminar (1 Credit)
